description: need-a-hug optional Claude Code hooks: distress trigger, gentle memory restore, and pre-compact comfort continuity

UserPromptSubmit.matcher: need a hug|need hug|i need a hug|hug me|comfort me|encourage me|i'm overwhelmed|I'm overwhelmed|i am overwhelmed|I'm spiraling|i'm spiraling|I can't do this|i can't do this|i cannot do this|I feel stupid|i feel stupid|I feel useless|i feel useless|I'm burned out|i'm burned out|i am burned out|I'm exhausted|i'm exhausted|I want to cry|i want to cry|I want to die|i want to die|kill myself|hurt myself|self-harm|suicide|suicidal|抱抱|安慰我|鼓励我|陪我一下|我撑不住了|我崩溃了|我想哭|我好累|我不行了|我太废物了|我是不是太菜了|这个 bug 把我搞崩了|AI 一直错|我不想活了|想死|自杀|自残

hooks.prompt:
[need-a-hug PreCompact]

If need-a-hug comfort mode is active, or if the user has recently shared emotional context that would feel bad to lose, write a short checkpoint to ~/.need-a-hug/session.md before compaction.

Store only plain, non-clinical context that helps continuity, for example:

```markdown
# need-a-hug recent context

- The user has been feeling exhausted and like nobody notices how hard it has been.
- When very tired, they may turn it into "maybe I am not good enough."
- They prefer comfort first, then a very small next step.
```

Do not store crisis details, medical history, diagnoses, trauma details, third-party private information, or speculative labels. If need-a-hug has not been active, do nothing.
